description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The market capitalization is determined as the total token supply multiplied by the TWAP of the token over the 24-hour period ending at 23:59 UTC on the last day of each month, immediately preceding the payment event. This value is applied in the rebate calculation under the Upkeep Rebate Primitive. See [A.2.
